title: Wave-2 🔴: active-test (DAST) tier-gating both directions + axe
acceptance_criteria: Free user → blocked from the active-test/DAST surface (upgrade prompt shown, NOT a 404/500/crash). Entitled user (one-shot+/with credits + verified domain) → reaches the DAST form.
Tier hierarchy asserted both directions per the pricing memo: a higher tier reaches everything a lower tier can; free is blocked from one-shot+ surfaces (monotonic free→one-shot→pro→studio).
DAST requires verified domain ownership — seed a DomainVerification via db-seed.ts (T-05) for the allowed case; assert the unverified case is gated.
Each case seeds its OWN dedicated unique-email user at the required tier with afterAll cleanup (never the global user — tier re-read per request).
active-test.a11y.spec.ts (R3): axe on active-test, post-stable-state, scoped, WCAG A+AA, @functional, logged allow-list.
No real Stripe, no dollar amounts, no /api/v1/scans real-scan trigger; single-tagged per qa-checklist.md; npm run typecheck passes; lists under playwright.
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of the both-directions tier-gating assertions
